changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-config/src/model.rs:1711-1758

Uncovered lines: 1728, 1754

```rust
pub fn get_agent(paths: &ModelPaths) -> Result<Option<String>, ModelError>
pub fn resolve_agent_config(paths: &ModelPaths) -> Result<ModelConfig, ModelError>
```

get_agent reads the config file and returns the configured model name. resolve_agent_config falls back to claude-code if no model is configured. Uncovered: the None return path when no model key exists, and the default claude-code fallback. Test with a config that has a model key and one without.
Add tests for ModelManager::get_agent and resolve_agent_config
